# System Map Evidence Report — v0.1

**Work Order:** 020 — Full System Map
**Timestamp (UTC):** 2026-05-11T18:30:00Z
**Overall Result:** **PASS**
**Authority:** This document is the evidence record that `SYSTEM-MAP-v0.1.md` was produced from real repository state on commit `b1bb16f`. Every claim in the map can be regenerated by re-running the commands listed here.

---

## 1. Commands Run

```
git status --short
git log --oneline -15
find . -maxdepth 2 -type f                          # filtered: skipped .git, .venv, target, __pycache__, .egg-info
ls vectors/*.json | wc -l
ls canonicalization/corpus/*.json | wc -l
ls -la chain/
.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ --collect-only -q
.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/
cargo test --manifest-path rust_verifier/Cargo.toml --quiet
go test ./go_verifier/...
make ci PYTHON=.venv/bin/python
make demo PYTHON=.venv/bin/python
grep -n -E "sys\.platform|darwin|linux|sandbox-exec" tools/os_isolation_runtime.py
grep -n -E "sys\.platform|darwin|linux|sandbox-exec" tools/real_agent_runtime.py
grep -n -E "def |governed-run|argparse|add_subparsers" intellagent_runtime/cli.py
head -25 intellagent_runtime/refusal.py
grep -n -E "sha256|hash|chain|previous" intellagent_runtime/audit_memory.py
wc -l intellagent_runtime/*.py tools/*.py rust_verifier/src/*.rs rust_verifier/tests/*.rs go_verifier/main.go go_verifier/internal/**/*.go
```

| Surface | Count | Method |

| Python source modules under `intellagent_runtime/` | 17 | `ls intellagent_runtime/*.py` (excluding `__init__.py`) |

| Go source files in `go_verifier/` | 8 | `find go_verifier -name '*.go'` |
| Frozen vectors | 33 | `ls vectors/*.json` |
| Canonicalization corpus | 10 | `ls canonicalization/corpus/*.json` |
| Test files | 23 | `ls tests/test_*.py` |
| pytest tests collected | 437 | `pytest --collect-only` |
| Rust unit + integration tests | 27 (14 + 13) | `cargo test` |
| Go test packages | 4 | `go test ./go_verifier/...` |
| `.win` chain files | 2 (genesis + 1 sealed record) | `ls chain/` |
| Makefile targets | 47 (counted from `.PHONY:` line) | `head -1 Makefile` |
| `make ci` stages | 18 | `Makefile` `ci:` rule prerequisites |

## 6. What This Evidence Supports

- The numbers and module paths in `SYSTEM-MAP-v0.1.md` were observed directly from the repo at commit `b1bb16f`, not assumed or recalled.
- The "implemented vs planned" matrix in `SYSTEM-MAP-v0.1.md` §11 was derived from `make ci` prerequisites versus the Makefile target list.
- The verification track table in §7 was derived by inspecting which verifiers import `intellagent_runtime` and which do not.

## 7. What This Evidence Does Not Support

- This report does not establish third-party validation. All verifier runs were executed by this session on this machine.
- This report does not assert that the implementations matrix is exhaustive. It enumerates the rows requested by WO 020; further unimplemented features may exist outside that list.
- This report does not re-run the `not-in-CI` targets (`pipeline-check`, `os-isolation-check`, `resource-limit-check`, `proposer-check`, `review-gate-check`, `real-agent-*`). Their green status is reported as "exercised by their own Makefile target" without re-running in this work order.
